evidence: "I love Agatha Christi mysteries no matter who the start is. They are always fun, full of intrigue..."
"I love Charlie Chan movies. They are from a different era..."
"The mysteries aren't easy to figure out..."
"The plots are complicated but are always saved."
"Covert Affairs keeps your interest and is fast paced."
"I was watching it on TV, had to go do something else. Upset I missed the end..."
"The actors fit their roles and each adds a lot to the relationships and the story."
"Excelent plots and perfect actors in each role."
"I love what the male quirky detective brings to the mysteries of Agatha Christi."
"Of course, Bruce Willis is my favorite actors."
"The cast seems real, not just acting..."
"He has a way of getting it calmed down and moving on."
"I wish there were more seasons of it."
"I keep thinking there will be a sequel."

summary: The user has a strong preference for mystery genres, particularly those with complex narratives and engaging characters. They enjoy fast-paced storytelling and have a high sensitivity to production quality, often expressing loyalty to specific creators like Agatha Christie and Bruce Willis.
